title: Group restrictions within the same board
excerpt: Hi! We have a board in which many different departments contribute. We want to restrict access so that one department can’t accidentally introduce or remove things from the group of another department. We tried partially…

posts.author: pentekborbala (Pentek Borbala)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! We have a board in which many different departments contribute. We want to restrict access so that one department can’t accidentally introduce or remove things from the group of another department. We tried partially restricting the whole board, but that would mean that the project manager would need to introduce all the tasks for each department and that means a lot of work for them, as there are more than 1000 items in the board.

How can we solve this issue? Thank you for your help!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @pentekborbala - You may want to explore Item Permissions, which is an Enterprise feature, to see if it will give you the freedom to build the board the way management needs, while keeping group activity safely secured under authorized people.
